G3846.strongs_def: to throw alongside, i.e. (reflexively) to reach a place, or (figuratively) to liken

G3807.derivation: from G3816 (παῖς) and a reduplicated form of G71 (ἄγω);
G3807.strongs_def: a boy-leader, i.e. a servant whose office it was to take the children to school; (by implication, (figuratively) a tutor ("pædagogue"))

G3834.strongs_def: adroitness, i.e. (in a bad sense) trickery or sophistry

G3891.derivation: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G3551 (νόμος);
G3891.strongs_def: to be opposed to law, i.e. to transgress

G3863.strongs_def: to stimulate alongside, i.e. excite to rivalry

G3897.derivation: neuter of a compound of G3844 (παρά) and the base of G4139 (πλησίον) (as adverb);

G3888.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of a derivative of G3454 (μῦθος);
G3888.strongs_def: to relate near, i.e. (by implication) encourage, console

G3837.derivation: genitive case (as adverb of place) of a presumed derivative of G3956 (πᾶς);

G3893.strongs_def: to embitter alongside, i.e. (figuratively) to exasperate

G3854.strongs_def: to become near, i.e. approach (have arrived); by implication, to appear publicly

G3818.derivation: feminine of an adjective of uncertain derivation;

G3898.derivation: adverb from the same as G3897 (παραπλήσιον);
G3898.strongs_def: in a manner near by, i.e. (figuratively) similarly

G3825.derivation: probably from the same as G3823 (πάλη) (through the idea of oscillatory repetition);
G3825.strongs_def: (adverbially) anew, i.e. (of place) back, (of time) once more, or (conjunctionally) furthermore or on the other hand

G3845.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G939 (βάσις);
G3845.strongs_def: to go contrary to, i.e. violate a command

G3860.strongs_def: to surrender, i.e yield up, intrust, transmit
G3860.kjv_def: betray, bring forth, cast, commit, deliver (up), give (over, up), hazard, put in prison, recommend

G3895.strongs_def: to fall aside, i.e. (figuratively) to apostatize

G3879.strongs_def: to bend beside, i.e. lean over (so as to peer within)

G3829.derivation: neuter of a presumed compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G1209 (δέχομαι);
G3829.strongs_def: all-receptive, i.e. a public lodging-place (caravanserai or khan)

G3877.strongs_def: to follow near, i.e. (figuratively) attend (as a result), trace out, conform to
G3877.kjv_def: attain, follow, fully know, have understanding

G3822.strongs_def: to make (passively, become) worn out, or declare obsolete

G3850.strongs_def: a similitude ("parable"), i.e. (symbolic) fictitious narrative (of common life conveying a moral), apothegm or adage

G3856.strongs_def: to show alongside (the public), i.e. expose to infamy
G3856.kjv_def: make a public example, put to an open shame

G3867.strongs_def: to mispraise, i.e. recommend or advise (a different course)

G3858.strongs_def: to accept near, i.e. admit or (by implication) delight in

G3814.strongs_def: a girl, i.e. (specially), a female slave or servant

G3803.strongs_def: a trap (as fastened by a noose or notch); figuratively, a trick or statagem (temptation)

G3801.lemma: ὁ ὢν καί ὁ ἦν καί ὁ ἐρχόμενος
G3801.translit: ho ṑn kaí ho ēn kaí ho erchómenos
G3801.derivation: a phrase combining G3588 (ὁ) with the present participle and imperfect of G1510 (εἰμί) and the present participle of G2064 (ἔρχομαι) by means of G2532 (καί);
G3801.strongs_def: the one being and the one that was and the one coming, i.e. the Eternal, as a divine epithet of Christ
G3801.kjv_def: which art (is, was), and (which) wast (is, was), and art (is) to come (shalt be)

G3883.derivation: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G236 (ἀλλάσσω);
G3883.strongs_def: transmutation (of phase or orbit), i.e. (figuratively) fickleness

G3808.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3816 (παῖς);

G3804.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G3806 (πάθος);
G3804.strongs_def: something undergone, i.e. hardship or pain; subjectively, an emotion or influence

G3831.derivation: from G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά);

G3824.strongs_def: (spiritual) rebirth (the state or the act), i.e. (figuratively) spiritual renovation; specially, Messianic restoration

G3878.strongs_def: to mishear, i.e. (by implication) to disobey

G3870.strongs_def: to call near, i.e. invite, invoke (by imploration, hortation or consolation)
G3870.kjv_def: beseech, call for, (be of good) comfort, desire, (give) exhort(-ation), intreat, pray
G3870.usage: beseech(43x), comfort(23x), exhort(21x), desire(8x), pray(6x), intreat(3x)

G3887.strongs_def: to stay near, i.e. remain (literally, tarry; or figuratively, be permanent, persevere)

G3800.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of the same as G3795 (ὀψάριον);
G3800.strongs_def: rations for a soldier, i.e. (by extension) his stipend or pay

G3838.strongs_def: full-ended, i.e. entire (neuter as noun, completion)

G3872.derivation: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G2698 (κατατίθημι);
G3872.strongs_def: something put down alongside, i.e. a deposit (sacred trust)

G3810.strongs_def: a trainer, i.e. teacher or (by implication) discipliner

G3826.derivation: dative case (adverb) of a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G4128 (πλῆθος);
G3826.strongs_def: in full multitude, i.e. concertedly or simultaneously

G3881.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G3004 (λέγω) (in its original sense);
G3881.strongs_def: (specially), to lay one's course near, i.e. sail past

G3816.strongs_def: a boy (as often beaten with impunity), or (by analogy), a girl, and (genitive case) a child; specially, a slave or servant (especially a minister to a king; and by eminence to God)
G3816.kjv_def: child, maid(-en), (man) servant, son, young man
G3816.usage: servant(10x), child(7x), son(1x), manservant(1x), maid(1x), maiden(1x)

G3811.strongs_def: to train up a child, i.e. educate, or (by implication), discipline (by punishment)

G3820.strongs_def: antique, i.e. not recent, worn out

G3817.strongs_def: to hit (as if by a single blow and less violently than G5180 (τύπτω)); specially, to sting (as a scorpion)

G3880.strongs_def: to receive near, i.e. associate with oneself (in any familiar or intimate act or relation); by analogy, to assume an office; figuratively, to learn

G3809.strongs_def: tutorage, i.e. education or training; by implication, disciplinary correction

G3857.strongs_def: a park, i.e. (specially), an Eden (place of future happiness, "paradise")

G3828.derivation: from a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G4443 (πυρά);
G3828.strongs_def: every-tribal, i.e. heterogeneous (G5561 (χώρα) being implied); Pamphylia, a region of Asia Minor

G3855.strongs_def: to lead near, i.e. (reflexively or intransitively) to go along or away

G3851.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G1011 (βουλεύω);

G3861.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and G1391 (δόξα) (in the sense of seeming);

G3886.strongs_def: to loosen beside, i.e. relax (perfect passive participle, paralyzed or enfeebled)
G3886.kjv_def: feeble, sick of the (taken with) palsy

G3868.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G154 (αἰτέω);
G3868.strongs_def: to beg off, i.e. deprecate, decline, shun

G3843.strongs_def: entirely; specially, at all events, (with negative, following) in no event
G3843.kjv_def: by all means, altogether, at all, needs, no doubt, in (no) wise, surely

G3844.strongs_def: properly, near; i.e. (with genitive case) from beside (literally or figuratively), (with dative case) at (or in) the vicinity of (objectively or subjectively), (with accusative case) to the proximity with (local (especially beyond or opposed to) or causal (on account of)
G3844.kjv_def: above, against, among, at, before, by, contrary to, X friend, from, + give (such things as they), + that (she) had, X his, in, more than, nigh unto, (out) of, past, save, side…by, in the sight of, than, (there-)fore, with

G3841.strongs_def: the all-ruling, i.e. God (as absolute and universal sovereign)

G3842.strongs_def: every when, i.e. at all times

G3819.derivation: probably another form for G3825 (πάλιν) (through the idea of retrocession);
G3819.strongs_def: (adverbially) formerly, or (by relatively) sometime since; (elliptically as adjective) ancient
G3819.kjv_def: any while, a great while ago, (of) old, in time past

G3833.derivation: from a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G3696 (ὅπλον);

G3806.strongs_def: properly, suffering ("pathos"), i.e. (subjectively) a passion (especially concupiscence)

G3873.strongs_def: to lie near, i.e. be at hand (figuratively, be prompt or easy)

G3859.derivation: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G1304 (διατρίβω);

G3813.strongs_def: a childling (of either sex), i.e. (properly), an infant, or (by extension) a half-grown boy or girl; figuratively, an immature Christian

G3853.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος);
G3853.strongs_def: to transmit a message, i.e. (by implication) to enjoin

G3862.strongs_def: transmission, i.e. (concretely) a precept; specially, the Jewish traditionary law

G3849.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G971 (βιάζω);
G3849.strongs_def: to force contrary to (nature), i.e. compel (by entreaty)
